news: [Bugfix] Thanks @dajiaohuang for your contribution on optimizing the scan and injection concurrency
[Contribute?] Create your pull request : many mysql and postgres clones to cover, testing on docker using python and .NET endpoints, or any other topic
[Iceberg levels] You are at level 0. At best. Can you progress to deeper levels ?
[Level 0] SQL injection strategies: Time, Blind bin, Error, Union (wiki: https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection/wiki/Strategy)
[Level -2] Injection into Remote Code Execution via User Defined Function and Web shell (wiki: https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection/wiki/Exploit)
[Level -4] Injection into RCE into Reverse shell (wiki: https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection/wiki/Reverse-shell)
[Pinned] Report any bugs and thoughts, add your star at https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection
